summary: Good recording with a particularly spirited Bob Weir performance
review: The reviewer had an ecstatic reaction to the show, noting that Bob (referred to as "Bobby") was in a special mood and that listening caused them to almost choke on their sandwich. No specific comments were made about the audio source or sound quality, so the recording is presumed listenable but uncharacterized.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one enthusiastic 4‑star review mentioning a strong Bob Weir performance; no data on recording quality, so rating reflects show enthusiasm with limited evidence.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewer did not comment on sound clarity, mix, or source type.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No detailed comments on set structure; only a note that Bob Weir's playing was unusually lively.

band_member_comments.Bob: Bobby (Bob Weir) was in a special mood and delivered an especially spirited performance.
